actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component id=698430411 corresponds to script GUID=71e616354a0b0cd47a7526ce46ba3eaf (SoundPlayer). Serialized settings in scene: source -> AudioSource(fileID=2093747358), sound -> AudioClip(guid=5bf50410f355a654e91279204bd96587). Expected: source.clip is set to sound and playback starts. PrefabInstance has Has_Rigidbody=False so only Trigger actions are applicable.

MonoBehaviour component id=698430408 corresponds to script GUID=c3441e8102712e94eb08515cc7e18fb8 (SpawnPaper). Serialized settings in scene: clip -> AudioClip(guid=5bf50410f355a654e91279204bd96587), paperToSpawn -> Prefab(fileID=8817731074829524137, name=Paper), position -> Transform/GameObject(fileID=1038081565). Expected: calling spawn() starts a coroutine that waits for clip.length seconds, then Instantiate(paperToSpawn) at position.transform.position/rotation. After the wait, a new Paper instance should exist in the scene.

MonoBehaviour id=759145567 corresponds to script GUID=d40707984c8c8654a8e7422e0d85449f (RunPC). Serialized settings in scene: canvas -> GameObject(fileID=1480975538), source -> AudioSource(fileID=1768927072), StartSound -> AudioClip(guid=c7ed05b156a403a42b5d91316854e42d), EndSound -> AudioClip(guid=33e37c2c5603b534a84188086a3b9147). Initial Isvisible=false so first TogglePC should call StartPC: canvas.SetActive(true), source.clip=StartSound and Play().
Second TogglePC call to cover ShutDownPC branch after StartPC has run. Expected: canvas.SetActive(false), source.clip=EndSound and Play(), Isvisible toggled back to false.

MonoBehaviour id=154554978 corresponds to script GUID=d39ba5afdc055594f8b27d3626aef4f5 (PlayTV). Serialized settings in scene: canvas -> GameObject(fileID=1417754200). Initial Isvisible=false so first ToggleVisibility should set Isvisible=true and canvas.SetActive(true).
Second ToggleVisibility call to validate the opposite state. Expected: Isvisible toggles back to false and canvas.SetActive(false).
